title: Projects
text:
Add More Projects
Copy any block above and fill in your own details. Each project can link to:

A .qmd file in the posts/ folder (full write-up with code)
An external URL (GitHub repo, Shiny app, etc.)
A rendered dashboard


Tip: The best portfolio projects show your thinking, not just your code. Include a section on what you tried that didn’t work.

title: Your First Project Write-Up
text:
Exploration
What did you find when you first looked at the data?


Code
mtcars |>
  ggplot(aes(x = wt, y = mpg, color = factor(cyl))) +
  geom_point(size = 3, alpha = 0.8) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("#1a3a5c", "#2e86ab", "#a8d8ea")) +
  labs(
    title = "Your Plot Title",
    x = "X Axis Label",
    y = "Y Axis Label",
    color = "Group"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13)





A descriptive caption for your plot

title: Your First Project Write-Up
text:
Analysis
Walk through your methodology here. Code-fold is on by default so readers can toggle code.


Code
# Your modeling code here
summary(lm(mpg ~ wt + cyl, data = mtcars))



Call:
lm(formula = mpg ~ wt + cyl, data = mtcars)

Residuals:
    Min      1Q  Median      3Q     Max 
-4.2893 -1.5512 -0.4684  1.5743  6.1004 

Coefficients:
            Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)    
(Intercept)  39.6863     1.7150  23.141  < 2e-16 ***
wt           -3.1910     0.7569  -4.216 0.000222 ***
cyl          -1.5078     0.4147  -3.636 0.001064 ** 
---
Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1

Residual standard error: 2.568 on 29 degrees of freedom
Multiple R-squared:  0.8302,    Adjusted R-squared:  0.8185 
F-statistic: 70.91 on 2 and 29 DF,  p-value: 6.809e-12

title: About Me
text:
Owen Heap


I’m studying data science and have a passion for using data to tell compelling stories. I enjoy exploring data, building models, and creating visualizations that help others understand complex information.
